nasb.text: You shall also take the bull for the sin offering, and it shall be burned in the appointed place of the house, outside the sanctuary.

esv.text: You shall also take the bull of the sin offering, and it shall be burned in the appointed place belonging to the temple, outside the sacred area.

cnv.text: 你又要把那作贖罪祭的公牛犢，燒在聖所外面，在聖殿指定的地方。

ccb.text: 并把赎罪用的公牛犊拿到圣所外指定的地方焚烧。
